docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $597.88 FILED BY KAMARA, MAUDE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, KRISTOPHER WARREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO SEP-17-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-16-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-03-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAUDE KAMARA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KRISTOPHER WARREN THOMAS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAUDE KAMARA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KRISTOPHER WARREN THOMAS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
